Täuber et al. (in prep.) - Statistical analysis

Author

Alexander Täuber

1 Required libraries, options, and paths

# Data manipulation
library(dplyr)
library(fs)
library(readr)
library(forcats)
library(here)
library(flextable)

# Stats
library(mgcv)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lmerTest)
library(MuMIn)
library(performance)
library(gratia)

# Plotting
library(sjPlot)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

# Scale helper function
source("src/scale_descale.R")


options(readr.show_col_types = FALSE)

data_path <- here("data/results/tsp_data.csv")
figure_path <- here("data/results/figures")

2 Data read-in

full_data <- read_csv(data_path) %>%
  # We filter out those TSPs that have no interacting crown elements at all
  dplyr::filter(coi > 0) %>%
  # Flag TSPs with large size differences
  mutate(
      tsp_scd = abs(sc_tree1 - sc_tree2),
      tsp_size_diff = abs(size_tree1 - size_tree2),
      tsp_height_diff = abs(height_tree1 - height_tree2),
      unequal_size_tsp = ifelse(tsp_size_diff < quantile(tsp_size_diff, 0.75), FALSE, TRUE),
      unequal_height_tsp = ifelse(tsp_height_diff < quantile(tsp_height_diff, 0.90), FALSE, TRUE)
  ) %>%
  # Scale and convert to factors where applicable
  mutate(
        tsp_ltd_s = as.numeric(scale(tsp_ltd)),
        cci_s = as.numeric(scale(cci)),
        coi_s = as.numeric(scale(coi)),
        tsp_scd = abs(sc_tree1 - sc_tree2),
        tsp_scd_s = as.numeric(scale(tsp_scd)),
        ln_sr_s = as.numeric(scale(ln_sr)),
        ln_n_s = as.numeric(scale(ln_n)),
        ln_comp = as.factor(ln_comp),
        tsp_div = as.factor(tsp_div) %>%
            relevel(ref = "mono"),
        tsp_habits = as.factor(tsp_habits) %>%
            relevel(ref = "mixed habit"),
        tsp_comp = {
            tsp_comp %>%
            as.factor() %>%
            forcats::fct_anon()
        },
        ln_comp = {
            ln_comp %>%
            as.factor() %>%
            forcats::fct_anon()
        }
    )

# Create variables for de-scaling
scale_data <- tibble(
    var = c("tsp_ltd", "tsp_scd", "cci", "coi")
) %>%
    mutate(center = attr(scale(full_data[var]), "scaled:center")) %>%
    mutate(scale = attr(scale(full_data[var]), "scaled:scale"))

center_ltd <- scale_data$center[scale_data$var == "tsp_ltd"]
center_scd <- scale_data$center[scale_data$var == "tsp_scd"]
center_ln_sr <- scale_data$center[scale_data$var == "ln_sr"]
center_ln_n <- scale_data$center[scale_data$var == "ln_n"]
center_coi <- scale_data$center[scale_data$var == "coi"]
scale_ltd <- scale_data$scale[scale_data$var == "tsp_ltd"]
scale_scd <- scale_data$scale[scale_data$var == "tsp_scd"]
scale_ln_sr <- scale_data$scale[scale_data$var == "ln_sr"]
scale_ln_n <- scale_data$scale[scale_data$var == "ln_n"]
scale_coi <- scale_data$scale[scale_data$var == "coi"]

ltd_limits <- scale_by(c(0, 4), center_ltd, scale_ltd)
ltd_breaks <- scale_by(seq(0, 4, 0.5), center_ltd, scale_ltd)
scd_limits <- scale_by(c(0, 1.45), center_scd, scale_scd)
scd_breaks <- scale_by(seq(0, 1.4, 0.2), center_scd, scale_scd)
coi_limits <- c(0, 0.4)
coi_breaks <- seq(0, 0.4, 0.1)

3 Main

3.1 Figure 2

3.1.1 Model

glmm_coi_cci <- glmmTMB::glmmTMB(coi ~ cci +
                                 (1|tsp_comp),
                         family = glmmTMB::beta_family(),
                         data = full_data,
                         REML = TRUE)

3.1.2 Figure

figure_2
table_1_a
  coi
Predictors Estimates std. Error CI Statistic p
(Intercept) -0.85 0.20 -1.24 – -0.46 -4.24 <0.001
cci -2.82 0.32 -3.45 – -2.19 -8.81 <0.001
Random Effects
σ2 0.56
τ00 tsp_comp 0.13
ICC 0.19
N tsp_comp 36
Observations 115
Marginal R2 / Conditional R2 0.422 / 0.530

3.2 Figure 3

3.2.1 Models

3.2.1.1 Crown complementarity index (CCI)

glmm_cci <- glmmTMB::glmmTMB(cci ~ tsp_ltd_s +
                                   tsp_scd_s +
                                   ln_sr_s +
                                   ln_n_s +
                                   (1|tsp_comp),
                         family = glmmTMB::beta_family(link = "logit"),
                         data = full_data,
                         REML = FALSE)

summary(glmm_cci)
 Family: beta  ( logit )
Formula:          
cci ~ tsp_ltd_s + tsp_scd_s + ln_sr_s + ln_n_s + (1 | tsp_comp)
Data: full_data

      AIC       BIC    logLik -2*log(L)  df.resid 
    -57.2     -38.0      35.6     -71.2       108 

Random effects:

Conditional model:

 tsp_comp (Intercept) 0.08007  0.283   
Number of obs: 115, groups:  tsp_comp, 36

Dispersion parameter for beta family (): 4.58 

Conditional model:
            Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
(Intercept)  0.54084    0.10246   5.279 1.30e-07 ***
tsp_ltd_s    0.33423    0.10117   3.304 0.000954 ***
tsp_scd_s    0.45131    0.10475   4.308 1.64e-05 ***
ln_sr_s      0.07581    0.09432   0.804 0.421523    
ln_n_s       0.06681    0.09174   0.728 0.466446    
---
Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
glmm_cci_1 <- update(glmm_cci, ~ . - ln_sr_s)

           df      AICc
glmm_cci    7 -56.12466
glmm_cci_1  6 -57.75224

3.2.1.2 Crown overlap index (COI)

glmm_coi <- glmmTMB::glmmTMB(coi ~ tsp_ltd_s +
                                   I(tsp_ltd_s^2) +
                                   tsp_scd_s +
                                   ln_sr_s +
                                   ln_n_s +
                                   (1|tsp_comp),
                         family = glmmTMB::beta_family(),
                         data = full_data,
                         REML = FALSE)
summary(glmm_coi)

4 Appendix

figure_s2

4.2 Figure S4

4.2.1 Model

glmm_ltd_scd <- glmmTMB::glmmTMB(tsp_scd ~ tsp_ltd + (1|tsp_comp),
                         family = gaussian(),
                         data = full_data,
                         REML = TRUE)
summary(glmm_ltd_scd)
 Family: gaussian  ( identity )
Formula:          tsp_scd ~ tsp_ltd + (1 | tsp_comp)
Data: full_data

      AIC       BIC    logLik -2*log(L)  df.resid 
     -0.4      10.6       4.2      -8.4       111 

Random effects:

Conditional model:
 Groups   Name        Variance  Std.Dev.
 tsp_comp (Intercept) 0.0002848 0.01688 
 Residual             0.0499945 0.22359 
Number of obs: 115, groups:  tsp_comp, 36

Dispersion estimate for gaussian family (sigma^2): 0.05 

Conditional model:
            Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
(Intercept)  0.15238    0.03632   4.196 2.72e-05 ***
tsp_ltd      0.07034    0.02885   2.438   0.0148 *  
---
Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
performance::r2(glmm_ltd_scd)
# R2 for Mixed Models

  Conditional R2: 0.057
     Marginal R2: 0.052
confint(glmm_ltd_scd, parm="beta_", method="Wald")
                 2.5 %    97.5 %   Estimate
(Intercept) 0.08119864 0.2235707 0.15238465
tsp_ltd     0.01378857 0.1268902 0.07033941

4.2.2 Figure

figure_s4

4.3 Figure S5

figure_s5

4.4 Figure S6

data_mono <- filter(full_data, tsp_div == "mono")
data_mix <- filter(full_data, tsp_div == "mix")

ltd_div_plot <- ggplot(full_data, aes(tsp_div, tsp_ltd)) +
    geom_violin(aes(fill = tsp_div), show.legend = FALSE) +
    theme_classic() +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 4, 0.5)) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 4)) +
    scale_x_discrete(labels=c(nrow(data_mono),
                             nrow(data_mix))) +
    xlab("n") +
    ylab("LTD") +
    theme(
        plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 20),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 20)
    )
scd_div_plot <- ggplot(full_data, aes(tsp_div, tsp_scd)) +
    geom_violin(aes(fill = tsp_div)) +
    theme_classic() +
    xlab("Leaf habit") +
    ylab("SCD") +
    xlab("n") +
    labs(fill = "TSP diversity") +
    scale_y_continuous(
      breaks = seq(0, 1.4, 0.2)
    ) +
    scale_x_discrete(labels=c(nrow(data_mono),
                             nrow(data_mix))) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1.4)) +
    theme(
        legend.text = element_text(size = 20),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 20),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 20)
    )

figure_s6 <- wrap_plots(ltd_div_plot, scd_div_plot)
ggsave(file = path(figure_path, "figure_s6.svg"),
    plot = figure_s6,
    width=14,
    height=7)
figure_s6

4.5 Figure S7

4.5.1 Models

sep_data <- full_data %>%
    filter(tsp_div == "mono") %>%
    mutate(tsp_ltd_s = as.numeric(scale(tsp_ltd)))

glmm_cci_sep <- glmmTMB::glmmTMB(cci ~ tsp_ltd_s:tsp_habits +
                                        tsp_scd_s:tsp_habits +
                                  (1|tsp_comp),
                         family = glmmTMB::beta_family(),
                         data = sep_data,
                         REML = TRUE)
summary(glmm_cci_sep)
 Family: beta  ( logit )
Formula:          
cci ~ tsp_ltd_s:tsp_habits + tsp_scd_s:tsp_habits + (1 | tsp_comp)
Data: sep_data

      AIC       BIC    logLik -2*log(L)  df.resid 
    -14.5       2.5      14.2     -28.5        76 

Random effects:

Conditional model:
 Groups   Name        Variance Std.Dev.
 tsp_comp (Intercept) 0.06635  0.2576  
Number of obs: 83, groups:  tsp_comp, 15

Dispersion parameter for beta family (): 4.62 

Conditional model:
                              Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)   
(Intercept)                     0.3494     0.1215   2.876  0.00402 **
tsp_ltd_s:tsp_habitsdeciduous   0.2042     0.1220   1.674  0.09418 . 
tsp_ltd_s:tsp_habitsevergreen   0.3369     0.1766   1.908  0.05643 . 
tsp_habitsdeciduous:tsp_scd_s   0.3679     0.1465   2.511  0.01205 * 
tsp_habitsevergreen:tsp_scd_s   0.5492     0.2195   2.502  0.01234 * 
---
Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
confint(glmm_cci_sep, parm="beta_", method="Wald")
                                     2.5 %    97.5 %  Estimate
(Intercept)                    0.111325932 0.5875481 0.3494370
tsp_ltd_s:tsp_habitsdeciduous -0.034913224 0.4432237 0.2041553
tsp_ltd_s:tsp_habitsevergreen -0.009228597 0.6830053 0.3368883
tsp_habitsdeciduous:tsp_scd_s  0.080708322 0.6550736 0.3678909
tsp_habitsevergreen:tsp_scd_s  0.119007949 0.9793805 0.5491942
performance::r2(glmm_cci_sep)
# R2 for Mixed Models

  Conditional R2: 0.680
     Marginal R2: 0.510
glmm_coi_sep <- glmmTMB::glmmTMB(coi ~ tsp_ltd_s:tsp_habits +
                                      tsp_scd_s:tsp_habits +
                                  (1|tsp_comp),
                         family = glmmTMB::beta_family(),
                         data = sep_data,
                         REML = TRUE)
